history.note: Improvement: exportToTypeScript now downloads a zip containing machine.ts, services.ts, package.json (xstate^5), and tsconfig.json — unzip + npm install + open in VS Code is all that's needed; nometa option strips meta fields for Stately editor compatibility; save results ZIP now includes {id}-machine.json and {id}-services.js alongside results.json so user can edit services (e.g. add SAMPLE_INPUTS) and reload without knowing internals; sample inputs modal replaced with live input fields per missing state + Run Tests callback — no file editing required; help.html updated with built-in runtime actions, Analyze/Share toolbar entries, TypeScript export section, and IDE Developer section with regression contracts reference

Feature: TypeScript export — app/export-typescript.js; window.exportToTypeScript() downloads {id}-machine.ts (createMachine config + inferred context/event types, types:{} as block for XState v5) and {id}-services.ts (wraps existing services.js with TS header, or generates typed stubs when no services loaded); wired in main.js alongside analyzeFlow; console help updated

Feature: Static analysis (Task 6) — app/analyze-flow.js; analyzeFlow(config, services) detects unreachable states, guard gaps (all branches guarded, no fallthrough), dead transitions (shadowed by earlier unguarded branch), unresolved guard names (when services loaded), missing event handlers (info); Analyze button in toolbar (analyze-btn) enabled in all flow-loaded states; window.analyzeFlow() exposed in console help; report stored in window._analysisReport

Feature: Share flow as compressed URL — app/share.js uses fflate deflateSync/inflateSync + base64url; buildShareUrl 3-tier graceful degradation (machine+services+results → machine+services → machine only → tooLarge); app/config.js holds CANONICAL_BASE_URL; Share button in toolbar opens popover with copy link + included summary or tooLarge message; boot-time #flow= hash detection auto-loads payload when smide reaches no_flow; share-btn added to smide-machine toolbar for all flow-loaded states

Fix: stopped-test restore shows all rows — store allPaths:traces in results so showResultsDrawer can render pending rows for untested paths (caseMap by path-1 index, pending rows from allPaths); resume: runAllTracesHeadless accepts priorResults option, pre-populates cases+caseMap, skips completed indices in loop; summary shows · K not run when tests were stopped; main.js passes window._testResults as priorResults so Test button resumes partial results

Fix: stopped-test results showed N/N denominator on restore — add pathCount field (full trace count) to results object in both runAllTraces and runAllTracesHeadless; showResultsDrawer uses pathCount ?? total as denominator so stopped runs display correctly as M/N

Persist test results in browser Cache API (xstate-ide-v1 cache, /xstate-ide/results) — cacheResults() called after runAllTracesHeadless and loadTestResults; on restore, checkPersistedState checks cache for hasResults, restorePersistedState loads cached results and shows drawer; clearResultsCache called on Start Fresh and on Load Flow (new flow invalidates prior results)

IDE LOG: observer-viewer background changed from --chat-bg to #282c34 (matches profile-viewer); fix & rendering as literal text in htm templates — CONTEXT & STATE and Apply & Restart now use bare & character

uiPrefs persistence — xstate-ide:uiPrefs in localStorage stores paneOffset/drawerHeight/profileOpen/observerOpen; _persistUIPrefs(patch) merges; _applyUIPrefs() called after mountPaneUI restores all four; index.html exposes window._applyPaneOffset + saves paneOffset on mouseup/_endDrag; toggleProfile/toggleObserver wrapped to persist after rAF; drawer height restored in _onDrawerAdded; drawer touchend saves height

IDE LOG: wire CHAT_INPUT/RESTART/REPLAY smide events — ChatUI accepts onUserInput callback (fires on submit+choice, not on replay steps); onRestart toolbar + onApplyCtx send RESTART; _replayTrace sends REPLAY before _restartRuntime; _restartRuntime accepts _isReplay flag to suppress LOAD_FLOW when replay drives a config switch

Fix: _showBlankSlate/_showRestorePrompt guarded by stateId change — XState5 fires snapshot on ignored events (no transition), causing prompt_restore to wipe ChatUI when _restartRuntime sends LOAD_FLOW; fix checks stateId !== _obsPrevStateId before calling these functions

ui-contracts: add observer section measurements (observer_toggle_height, observer_viewer_open_maxHeight, observer_viewer_closed_height); expose window.toggleObserver from main.js; PaneUI.mountPaneUI returns toggleObserver; baseline recapture required

Task 6.5: smide observer chat pane — SmideObserverSection in PaneUI.js renders IDE LOG accordion between CONTEXT & STATE and replay bar; three message classes: user bubble (right, blue) for user-sent smide events, system label (centred italic) for onDone/onError, bot bubble (left, grey) for destination state meta.chat; smide-machine.json gains meta.chat + meta.onDone + meta.onError on all states; main.js wraps smideRuntime.send() to capture _pendingSmideEvent (XState5 snapshot.event is not exposed); onDone/onError detected structurally via prev state invoke + target state; #observer-mount added to index.html; observer styles in ide-theme.css reuse chat-theme .msg classes; ref on #observer-viewer for correct auto-scroll

Task 5: smide-machine as live Runtime — smideRuntime (headless) drives toolbar/pane via onSnapshot; production services inline in main.js (checkPersistedState reads localStorage, restorePersistedState calls _activateFlow); _setSmideState() removed, callers send XState events (LOAD_FLOW, RUN_TESTS, TESTS_COMPLETE, TESTS_STOP, LOAD_SERVICES); window._setSmideState shim maps legacy state IDs for generate-traces.js/ui-contracts.js; restore prompt and blank-slate driven from onSnapshot (prompt_restore/no_flow states); smide-machine gains LOAD_RESULTS on flow_idle/session_active/results_saved and LOAD_FLOW on load_error

Add smide-contracts regression tests — three suites: getAllTraces structural assertions + path count baseline (suite 1), Runtime driven through 8 named boot/interaction paths with inline service variants (suite 2), static structure check of all state targets and guard references (suite 3, no baseline, always runs); smide-baseline.json to be captured and committed on first run; index.html loads smide-contracts.js; main.js quick-start renamed to 'Regression contracts' and now lists ui_full + runtime_contracts + smide_contracts

ui-contracts: add drawer Y-position coverage — drawer_top + drawer_bottom_viewport_distance in results_drawer section (NEAR_ZERO_METRICS absolute check catches off-screen positioning); mobile_drawer_bottom_viewport_distance + mobile_drawer_header_top_in_viewport via _measureDrawerInMobile() called inside snapshotMobileLayout(); diagram_pane_right + right_pane_left added to default section to verify in-flow pane alignment

Fix: results drawer no longer goes off-screen after window resize across 700px mobile/desktop threshold — isMobile is now reactive state updated by resize listener; collapse effect deps include isMobile so correct branch runs on mode switch; each branch clears the other's stale styles (bottom/height/overflow vs transform); onMouseUp always snaps to bottom:0 so no negative bottom can survive a mode switch; add drawerDump() and drawerReset() console debug helpers

Add runtime-contracts regression tests — two suites: inline machine (text input, guard validation, choice events, updateContext, final state) and realtor machine (async services via fromPromise, always-transient route_by_timing, onDone/onError, recordService, two divergent paths); realtor-machine.json + realtor-services.js copied into app/test/ for server accessibility; runtime-baseline.json committed at v0.12.47; index.html loads runtime-contracts.js alongside ui-contracts.js

Fix: pack prod — preact/hooks and htm/preact CDN URLs now use ?external=preact so esm.sh emits bare 'preact' specifiers instead of /preact?target=es2022 root-relative imports; bare specifiers resolve via importmap to ./preact.js, eliminating the query-string path that static servers can't serve and the version conflict from following the redirect

Fix: pack prod — fetchModuleTree now sanitizes query-string import paths (e.g. /preact?target=es2022) by following the esm.sh redirect and storing files at the final pathname; rewrites those import specifiers in source so static servers can serve them (superseded by 0.12.46)

Task 3e: Preact results drawer — ResultsDrawerUI.js replaces imperative _createDrawerShell/_td/showResultsDrawer in generate-traces.js; mountResultsDrawer() Preact component owns header/subheader/table/drag/collapse/resize; runAllTracesHeadless + showResultsDrawer use drawerHandle.updateRow/setSummary/setRows/selectRow; _restoreCase uses window._setChatMessages + window._restoreStateView instead of direct DOM writes; _dismissDrawer() replaces document.getElementById().remove() pattern

Task 3d: Preact pane UI — titlebar, profile section (CONTEXT & STATE toggle + ctx-edit panel), and replay bar migrated to PaneUI.js; mountPaneUI() replaces static HTML; _updatePane patch fn drives all updates; window.toggleProfile/window._showReplayBar/window._clearReplayBar re-exposed via PaneUI; _restoreCase in generate-traces uses _showReplayBar + _activeReplayConfig instead of direct onclick override

Task 3+4: Preact toolbar — toolbar migrated to Preact/htm component (ToolbarUI.js); mountToolbar() replaces static HTML; _setSmideState/_setTestRunning update state via _updateToolbar patch function; test button click logic moves to onTest callback; importmap gains preact/preact/hooks/htm/preact entries. Task 4: prod bundle now offline-ready — xstate.js and fflate.js fetched from CDN at pack time and bundled locally; importmap uses ./xstate.js and ./fflate.js instead of CDN URLs

Fix: ui-contracts — ui_full now loads smide-test-results.json fixture (results_ready state) so all toolbar buttons including Save Flow are visible during capture/check; _loadFixture() helper replicates loadTestResults programmatically via fetch; capture uses blob download instead of showSaveFilePicker (no user-gesture requirement); popup URL derived from import.meta.url not location.href; _waitFor checks #input-area controls not just #messages; hidden toolbar buttons skipped in measureToolbarButtons; console help and docblock updated

Refactor: SAMPLE_INPUTS per-services — getAllTraces(config, sampleInputs={}) accepts an optional map; services files can now export SAMPLE_INPUTS keyed by state id and it takes precedence over the built-in fallback in generate-traces.js; runAllTracesHeadless passes services.SAMPLE_INPUTS ?? {} automatically

Fix: previously-skipped rows are now clickable after a failed re-run — updateRow() creates diffRow and wires tr.onclick when status=fail and no click handler exists yet (skipped rows never had one); diff messages are visible on row click

Fix: re-run row update — reverted _replayTrace to simple form (no callback param); re-run buttons now hook rt.onReplayDone directly via setTimeout(100ms), guaranteed to fire after _replayTrace's own setTimeout(50ms) has already started replay(); eliminates the race where onReplayDone was assigned in the same tick as replay() was called

Fix: re-run of originally-skipped rows now shows diff messages on failure — diffRow created on the fly and inserted after tr when a skipped row's re-run fails; clicking the row expands it to show diffs; diffRow removed if re-run passes

Fix: re-run button (▶) in results drawer now updates the row — _replayTrace accepts optional onDone(runtime) callback; after foreground replay completes, compareTraces runs and the row status/state/diffs update in-place for both the live test drawer and the load-results drawer

Feature: initial context editability — ⚙ Initial button in CONTEXT & STATE panel opens JSON editor; overrides are applied on top of machine config.context at Runtime.start(); overrides persist to localStorage alongside the flow and are restored on session restore; internal _trace/trace fields excluded from editor

UX: live results drawer built upfront showing all N paths as pending before tests start; rows update in-place with running/pass/fail/skipped status; per-row Skip button on running row calls skipCurrentTrace() (stops headless actor, unblocks polling loops); per-row ▶ Re-run button on failed/skipped rows replays path in foreground IDE Runtime with consoleLogger for full console visibility; _createDrawerShell() extracted as shared infrastructure for live runner and Load Results path

Fix: stopAllTraces() now stops the in-flight headless runtime actor, unblocking _waitForStateChange when a guard failure causes replay() to hang; added post-replay interrupt check so the loop breaks immediately; added SAMPLE_INPUTS for subscription_management_v2 text-input states
UX: Save Flow removed from toolbar except in results_ready — only useful when extracting an embedded flow from loaded results; button is hidden (not greyed) in all other states

Fix: on rotation in mobile mode, preserve visible right-pane pixel width rather than keeping _panOffset constant — diagram pane grows/shrinks into new orientation; results drawer tracks accordingly via _onPanOffsetChange

Fix: mobile landscape results drawer tracks right-pane slide position in real time via _onPanOffsetChange hook in _applyOffset; drawer fills diagram visible area (left:0 to rpRect.left) in all landscape orientations; portrait stays full-width; desktop landscape retains min-width:360px floor

Fix: on rotation, diagramReset() clears stale pan/zoom so diagram re-centers in new viewport; results drawer full-width in mobile landscape (right pane is overlay); desktop landscape drawer gets min-width = max(diagram-pane-width, 360px)

Fix: desktop results drawer — mouse drag uses 5px threshold before committing to drag mode; pure clicks no longer set _headerDragOccurred so header onclick fires correctly; snap-back only runs after a real drag
UX: results drawer is persistent — close button removed, replaced with ▲/▼ collapse arrow; drawer stays in DOM until a new test run replaces it; tap header to expand/collapse

UX: toolbar buttons driven by smide-machine meta.toolbar per state — _setSmideState() replaces scattered _setFlowLoaded/_setResultsReady; results_ready (load from file) shows Load Results not Save Results; missing IDs added to restart/save-flow/pack-prod buttons; save-results-btn virtual ID in results_unsaved state
Version bump

Fix: fullscreen nudge gated to touch devices only (pointer: coarse); #fs-exit-btn added to titlebar — hidden normally, shown via body.in-fullscreen when fullscreen is active; fullscreenchange toggles body.in-fullscreen class

Fix: slide-handle touch zone no longer blocks buttons inside pane — drag committed only after clear horizontal intent (dx > 8px && dx > dy) in touchmove; pure taps pass through to replay bar and other buttons

Fix mobile landscape: force-mobile-layout applied on phones (portrait width ≤ 700px) regardless of orientation — overlay model + touch slider active in landscape; mobile-landscape CSS class for compact toolbar on wider phones

Fix rotation: pane offset reset when layout mode switches (mobile↔desktop) or viewport resizes; results drawer constrained to diagram area in landscape (Option A — right edge tracks right pane left edge); toolbar compact layout in mobile landscape (reduced padding + font-size)
UX: graph direction auto-detects (TD on desktop/portrait, LR on mobile landscape); ⇄ toggle button in diagram heading for manual override; re-renders on screen rotation

Fix: replay bar buttons unclickable on mobile — slide-handle ::before set to pointer-events:none, touch zone extended via document-level proximity check instead; replay bar left padding increased to 18px

UX: slide-handle restored on mobile (9px visual, 69px touch zone via ::before); pane 99% width; send button flips left on any pan offset; choice buttons stack vertically left in narrow mode; diagram pinch-zoom (2-finger); results drawer snap-collapse refits diagram via rAF + transitionend

UX: pane-tab free drag (stops at release position, snaps closed only if chat < 80px); tab raised by 24px above profile-toggle; ghost tab (#pane-tab-ghost, position:fixed right:0, left-protruding bump) replaces tab when fully collapsed — tap to expand, drag to free resize

UX: mobile slide handle replaced by semicircular pull tab (#pane-tab) at left edge of pane just above CONTEXT & STATE — tap to collapse/expand, drag to resize; flips via scaleX(-1) when fully collapsed so bump protrudes into diagram; desktop slide-handle unchanged
UX: narrow pane — Send button moves to left of input field when pane-content width < 220px (ResizeObserver toggles pane-narrow class; flex-direction: row-reverse in chat-theme.css)
Fix: results drawer desktop width restored to 400px; right edge tracks right-pane left boundary so drawer never overlaps right pane

Fix: results drawer confined to diagram pane on desktop — right edge tracks right-pane left boundary via ResizeObserver; Test button disabled while unsaved results exist (re-enabled after Save Results)

Feature: auto-persist flow to localStorage (xstate-ide:flow key) — on next load shows restore prompt with flow id and Restore/Start fresh buttons; _activateFlow saves machineJson + servicesSource after every successful load
Docs: ui-contracts.js — workflow instructions updated to lead with ui_full() as primary entry point; low-level ui_contracts() calls moved to secondary section

Fix: mobile slide handle — --handle-w overridden to 32px on :root inside @media (max-width: 700px) and on body.force-mobile-layout so #pane-content calc() rules pick up the wider value; grip pill enlarged (5px × 40px)
UX: results drawer starts expanded; mobile collapse peeks header at viewport bottom via translateY; download JSON button removed from drawer

Fix: reloadServices dynamic export resolution — no longer hardcoded to realtorServices; picks default export, then first named export, then plain-object spread; prevents sealed module namespace being stored as activeServices

Fix: subscription-services.js — services hoisted to top level, guard signatures fixed for XState 5, process.env removed, watchRetryWindow made non-resolving to prevent past_due self-loop; subscription-machine.json added to repo
Fix: services file optional — loading a bare machine.json without services.js now works (activeServices reset to {}); blank-slate hint and help.html updated accordingly
Docs: help.html — guide covering machine JSON, services JS, guards, invoke states, testing, and results; realtor bot walkthrough with annotated code examples; help link shown in blank-slate UI
Fix: load-results → test regression — _activateFlow no longer overwrites window.runAllTraces, preserving servicesSource so guards are restored correctly on fresh-app load

Fix: loadTestResults restores services and config from saved results JSON — servicesSource stored in results object, _reloadServicesFromSource and _setActiveConfig called on load so re-runs work without manual flow reload

UX: toast notifications for flow and results load errors (invalid JSON, missing files, services import failure); toast anchored to bottom viewport-width-capped for portrait mobile; blank slate hint explaining both machine.json and services.js must be selected together

Fix: getAllTraces cycle detection — emit valid prefix instead of [CYCLE:] marker so paths replay cleanly on machines without a final state; getAllTraces guarded invoke.onDone — walk only unguarded fallback branch so generated paths match actual service-driven runtime behaviour; root index.html redirect to app/ so server from repo root still works

Repo reorganised into app/ (IDE engine) and flows/ (example flows); smide and ui-contracts test fixtures moved to app/test/; validators.js inlined into realtor-services.js for blob-URL self-containment; headless test runner (runAllTracesHeadless) — one Runtime per path, no DOM rendering, no inter-path delays, keyboard listeners skipped; Runtime headless option; realtor mock service delays reduced to 0ms; ui_full() one-call ui-contracts orchestration; _loadFlowFromUrl programmatic flow loader; smide-machine redesigned with render_ui/prompt_restore/load_error states and guarded invoke.onDone branches; generate-traces and renderDiagram fixed to handle array invoke.onDone; realtor-services.js dependency on validators.js removed

Fix: generate-traces.js — compareTraces() and runAllTraces() now normalise the enriched _trace envelope returned by getTrace() into a flat value array before comparison; validation-failure and service steps are filtered out; legacy flat-array format passes through unchanged

UI: prod bundle index.html — polished page chrome: fixed viewport layout, centered card (max 560px), dark header bar with flow id + version badge, Segoe UI font, soft-keyboard-safe layout; mermaid removed from prod importmap

Fix: Runtime.js — inject invoke.input = ({ context }) => context for all invoke states lacking an explicit input field; XState 5 does not auto-forward context to invoked actors; fn(input) → fn({ input }) so services receive { input: context } as expected

Phase 5: Enriched trace — _trace envelope with flowId, flowVersion, sessionId, startedAt, steps[]; each step records { stateId, value, at, ms }; validation failures recorded with valid:false; service results recorded with { service, ok, result, at, ms }; getTrace() returns full envelope; replay() handles both old flat-array and new envelope formats; IDE context viewer renders enriched trace rows

Phase 4: Chat UI + theming separation — ChatUI.js owns all chat DOM (bubbles, input, errors, choices); chat-theme.css owns chat styles via CSS custom properties; ide-theme.css owns all IDE shell styles; index.html has no inline <style>, links both CSS files; main.js is IDE shell only (renderIDE, Save/Load Flow, visited edges); _restartRuntime and _replayTrace delegate DOM clear to chatUI.clear()

Runtime.js: event-driven replay — replaced fixed 600ms per-step delay with _waitForStableState() / _waitForStateChange() polling; onReplayDone callback fires on completion; generate-traces.js: runAllTraces() awaits onReplayDone instead of estimateDuration timer; estimateDuration and timing constants (STEP_MS, INVOKE_FALLBACK_MS, STARTUP_MS, BUFFER_MS, INVOKE_DELAYS) removed

ui-contracts.js: appVersion stamped in baseline at capture time; version mismatch surfaces as warning with checkout hint; profile_viewer_open_height removed from snapshot (content-dependent, not a CSS regression signal); DYNAMIC_HEIGHT_METRICS exclusion set skips content-driven metrics in comparison; main.js: window._appVersion exposed after version badge is set

ui-contracts.js: viewport-stamped baseline files (ui-baseline-WxH.json) replace fixed ui-baseline.json — no TARGET_W/H constants to maintain, each machine auto-discovers and checks its own baseline; enforceViewport removed; baselineUrl() computed from window.innerWidth/innerHeight at call time; index.html: force-mobile-layout split into standalone ruleset separate from @media block

Fix: diagram edge labels now show ✅ instead of ✓ on visited paths; visitedEdges captured per test case so row-click correctly shows traversed paths; old results drawer dismissed when Test button is clicked

Mobile results drawer: larger touch-friendly header (52px, 14px font); slide-down collapse via translateY transition instead of display:none; starts collapsed on mobile; diagram-pane reserves bottom space for drawer title bar; auto-selects first row on open; toolbar buttons emoji above label with
; Restart and Replay buttons same treatment

UI: toolbar buttons restored to large touch-friendly style (flex:1, 12px 10px padding, 14px font, line-height 1.3, min-width 70px); Paths button re-added; button order matches Chatbot Logic IDE reference

UI: permanent #slide-handle on left edge of right pane — always visible including when fully collapsed; desktop drag resizes both panes; mobile tap toggles collapse, drag sets width freely with snap-to-collapse below 120px; right pane starts at 88% on mobile leaving diagram visible; toolbar restored to old large touch-friendly button style (8px 16px padding, 13px font, full labels: Save Flow, Load Flow, Test, Load Results); mobile-restore-btn removed; keyboard-shift fix retained (position:fixed #app)
Fix: keyboard resize — layout root changed to position:fixed/inset:0; floating mobile-restore-btn outside right pane; swipe-to-restore removed

Mobile UI: pinch-to-zoom on diagram (zoom buttons hidden on touch devices); desktop pane resize drag handle between diagram and right pane; mobile collapse tab on left edge of right pane slides pane away to reveal diagram (replaces full swipe-away); test results drawer touch-draggable via MutationObserver; swipe gestures preserved on non-interactive areas
Fix: test results viewer captures and restores visitedEdges per case; _visitedEdges exposed on window; _replayTrace/_restartRuntime accept overrideConfig

UI: SM-IDE title bar with version badge; toolbar buttons no longer overflow; context viewer collapsed by default with slide toggle; 100dvh + safe-area-inset fixes mobile URL bar overlap; touch pan on diagram; mobile swipe handle to reveal diagram behind right pane; test results row click restores captured state instantly without re-running; replay input populated on row click for manual re-run; invoke-aware duration estimator in generate-traces.js
Feature: generate-traces.js — runAllTraces() with self-test comparison, draggable/collapsible results drawer, stop button, load results from saved JSON, downloadTestResults()
Fix: user bubbles driven by trace length delta; replay restart ownership moved to _replayTrace; onReplayStep increments _lastTraceLength to prevent doubles
Phase 3: Runtime isolation — ChatEngine renamed Runtime; zero UI knowledge; single onSnapshot callback; main.js split into renderChat + renderIDE
Phase 2: Logger abstraction — nullLogger/consoleLogger/resolveLogger; ChatEngine accepts injected logger; production silent by default, debug via ?debug=true or localStorage
Fix: visited edge key changed from fromState|toState to fromState|eventType
Fix: diagram-canvas position:absolute so SVG renders visibly; zoom/pan/reset working
Fix: drop linkStyle and ==> arrows; visited edges marked with checkmark label prefix
Feature: diagram fits viewport; zoom/pan controls; visited edge tracking
Fix: Load Flow accepts ZIP, bare .json, bare .js, or pair
Feature: Save/Load Flow as paired ZIP
Fix: layout fits 100% zoom; Send button added
Fix: deep copy config before mutation in start()
Fix: pre-generate assign closures for XState 5
Diagnostics: raw action log, version+URL at boot
Fix: combine updateContext actions on email SUBMIT
Fix: user bubble ordering
Fix: diagram array transitions, validation bubble, replay guard check
Phase 1: validation moved to XState-native guards
Input validation + state-change logging
Initial release
